options.code:
await actions.setPageVariable("filteredServices", page.variables.allServices )
await actions.setPageVariable("filteredConfigs",page.variables.allConfigs)
await actions.setPageVariable("filteredConfigValues",page.variables.allConfigValues)
await actions.setPageVariable("CMRHelperText",page.variables.isTestEnvironment ? "Enter a dummy CMR eg. CMR-111709": "")
await actions.setPageVariable("hideRolloutButtonCondition", queries.fetchConfigDetails.data['Param Type'] !== "PARAM_TYPE_SINGLE_VALUED" || page.variables.isMarketplaceAware.value ? true : ! components.configValuesTable.data[0].is_in_rollout_phase)
await actions.setPageVariable("disableCanaryRunningConfigs",( page.variables.selectedConfig ==="CANARY_RUNNING") && ! page.variables.isAdmin)
await actions.setPageVariable("isNonTech", page.variables.isTestEnvironment.value ? false : !( ( globals.current_user?.metadata?.hasOwnProperty("claims") && globals.current_user?.metadata?.claims?.hasOwnProperty("personas") && ( globals.current_user?.metadata?.claims?.personas[0]?.org?.hasOwnProperty("engineer") || globals.current_user?.metadata?.claims?.personas[0]?.org?.hasOwnProperty("engineering_lead") || globals.current_user?.metadata.claims.personas[0].org.hasOwnProperty("engineering_manager") ) ) || page.variables?.techList?.value?.hasOwnProperty( globals.current_user?.email)) )
await actions.setPageVariable("bucketName", page.variables.isTestEnvironment.value ? `cpvfilesv1-${ window.location.href.slice(15, 21)}`: `cpvfilesv1` )
await actions.setPageVariable("approvalFlowEnabledServices",page.variables.isTestEnvironment ? "" : "*")
await actions.setPageVariable("appFilteredConfigEntries", page.variables?.appConfigEntries)
